name: Topple Mastery: Finesse weapon uses DEX for save DC
description: A DEX-focused Fighter attacks with a Trident (topple mastery) that has finesse. The save DC for topple should be calculated as 8 + max(STR, DEX) + prof. With STR 10 (+0) and DEX 18 (+4), DC should be 8 + 4 + 3 = 15, NOT 8 + 0 + 3 = 11. The goblin has CON +0, so needs to roll 15+ to save — very likely to fail. This validates the isFinesse() check in the roll-state-machine mastery DC code.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.description: You have mastered the use of certain weapons.

input.text: I attack the goblin with my trident
I attack the Goblin Brute with my trident

actions.comment: Roll 15 + 7 = 22 vs AC 13 — hit. Topple mastery triggers CON save. DC should be 15 (8 + 4 DEX + 3 prof) because weapon is finesse and DEX > STR.
Damage 5 + 4 = 9. After damage, topple auto-triggers. Goblin CON save: +0 mod, needs 15+. With seeded dice, goblin should fail.
Goblin should be Prone from topple mastery (failed CON save vs DC 15 using finesse DEX modifier). If finesse wasn't detected, DC would be 11 (8 + 0 STR + 3 prof) — much easier to pass.
